TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_landaway, title = landaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/landaway} }

S.FORM: sulit nu hulam:綠色的 tinaku a kamu landaway 綠色的 u langdaway ku tupel niya saydang. 老師帶綠色的帽子. namakalat nu langdaway bawu kaku. 我被青竹絲咬過. u langdaway ku zikuc atu calaped nu maku ayza. .
S.PHON: sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam:*** tinaku a kamu r~ɾandawaj *** u r~ɾaŋdawaj ku tupər~ɾ nija sajdaŋ. ********. namakar~ɾat nu r~ɾaŋdawaj bawu kaku. *******. u r~ɾaŋdawaj ku zikuʦ atu ʦar~ɾapəd nu maku ajza. .
S.FORM: sulit nu hulam:綠色的 tinaku a kamu landaway 綠色的 u langdaway ku tupel niya saydang. 老師帶綠色的帽子. namakalat nu langdaway bawu kaku. 我被青竹絲咬過. u langdaway ku zikuc atu calaped nu maku ayza. .
S.PHON: sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam:*** tinaku a kamu r~ɾandawaj *** u r~ɾaŋdawaj ku tupər~ɾ nija sajdaŋ. ********. namakar~ɾat nu r~ɾaŋdawaj bawu kaku. *******. u r~ɾaŋdawaj ku zikuʦ atu ʦar~ɾapəd nu maku ajza. .
